summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 5 features: Calendriers par Centre de Charge, Stock Projeté, Règles métier sur article_id (bug fix validated), Attributs articles étendus, et Règles métier sur attributs. All 17 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED.
seed_data_creation: Test data already in place: 2 orders, 2 operations, 10 articles with attributes, 2 FORBID rules (article_id + width), 2 calendars
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features tested and working: 1) Calendar dropdown on Centres de Charge - LVC001 has 'Horaires Usine' calendar, 2) Stock Projeté page shows 10 articles with OK status and scheduled/unscheduled counters, 3) FORBID rule on article_id 100235570 correctly blocks TP5000_1 - OF_TEST_001 assigned to TP5000_2, 4) Articles have extended attributes (width, thickness, material_type, color, length), 5) Règles Métier form has Simple and Attribute modes

TestCalendars.test_create_calendar: PASS - Can create calendar with working_days, start_hour, end_hour

TestCentresDeChargeWithCalendar.test_get_centres_de_charge: PASS - Returns 4 centres with calendar_id field

TestBusinessRulesOnArticleId.test_get_rules_with_article_id: PASS - Found FORBID rule on article 100235570
TestBusinessRulesOnArticleId.test_create_forbid_rule_on_article_id: PASS - Can create FORBID rule with article_id
TestBusinessRulesOnArticleId.test_diagnostic_forbid_rule_article_id: PASS - OF_TEST_001 with article 100235570 assigned to TP5000_2 (not TP5000_1)

TestBusinessRulesOnAttributes.test_get_rules_with_attributes: PASS - Found rule 'Largeur max 600mm sur TP5000_1'
TestBusinessRulesOnAttributes.test_create_forbid_rule_on_width_attribu: PASS - Can create rule with width > 600
TestBusinessRulesOnAttributes.test_create_forbid_rule_on_thickness_att: PASS - Can create rule with thickness
TestBusinessRulesOnAttributes.test_create_forbid_rule_on_material_type: PASS - Can create rule with material_type=ACIER

TestSchedulingWithCalendarConstraints.test_scheduling_calculate: PASS - Scheduling works with calendar constraints

TestEndToEndFlow.test_complete_flow: PASS - Full flow: data stats, centres, rules, stock, diagnostic

frontend_ui.CentresDeCharge: PASS - Table with calendar dropdowns for each centre (4 dropdowns)
frontend_ui.StockProjete: PASS - Summary cards (Total: 10, En Rupture: 0, Stock OK: 10, Ordonnancées: 0/6)
frontend_ui.ReglesMétier: PASS - Form with Simple and Attribute modes, 2 existing FORBID rules
frontend_ui.Diagnostic: PASS - Shows 2 ops, rules loaded, OF_TEST_001 correctly assigned to TP5000_2
frontend_ui.Calendriers: PASS - Shows Default and Horaires Usine calendars

business_rules_verification.FORBID_Article_100235570: ✓ OF_TEST_001 (article 100235570) correctly assigned to TP5000_2, NOT TP5000_1
business_rules_verification.FORBID_Largeur_600mm: ✓ Rule 'Largeur max 600mm sur TP5000_1' visible in Règles Métier table

features_verified.3_Regles_Article_ID: ✓ FORBID rule on article_id 100235570 blocks TP5000_1 - bug fix validated
features_verified.4_Attributs_Articles: ✓ Import with largeur, épaisseur, couleur, type_matiere, longueur supported
features_verified.5_Regles_Attributs: ✓ Can create rules with attribute_name, attribute_operator, attribute_value
